clusters.title: Ex-rapper Balendra Shah set to be Nepal PM after party’s landslide election win

items.title: Ex-rapper Balendra Shah set to be Nepal PM after party’s landslide election win
items.standfirst: Shah’s Rastriya Swatantra party secures thumping victory in first poll since gen Z protests that toppled government Balendra Shah, the rapper turned politician and popular figurehead of a gen Z revolution, looks set to become Nepal’s next prime minister after his party won by an unprecedented margin.Shah, known widely as Balen, and his Rastriya Swatantra party (RSP) secured a rare landslide victory in the first election since youth-led protests during which dozens were killed and the former government was toppled. Continue reading...
items.content: Shah’s Rastriya Swatantra party secures thumping victory in first poll since gen Z protests that toppled government Balendra Shah, the rapper turned politician and popular figurehead of a gen Z revolution, looks set to become Nepal’s next prime minister after his party won by an unprecedented margin.Shah, known widely as Balen, and his Rastriya Swatantra party (RSP) secured a rare landslide victory in the first election since youth-led protests during which dozens were killed and the former government was toppled. Continue reading...

items.title: Rapper and Gen Z protest leader on track to be Nepal's PM
items.standfirst: A former rapper is on track to win Nepal’s first election since youth-driven protests toppled the incumbent political leadership last year.
items.content: A former rapper is on track to win Nepal’s first election since youth-driven protests toppled the incumbent political leadership last year.

items.title: A new Nepali party, led by an ex-rapper, is set for a landslide win in parliamentary election
items.standfirst: A Nepali political party led by an ex-rapper is set for a landslide victory in the country's first parliamentary election since Gen Z protests ousted the old leadership that has ruled the Himalayan nation for decades.
items.content: A Nepali political party led by an ex-rapper is set for a landslide victory in the country's first parliamentary election since Gen Z protests ousted the old leadership that has ruled the Himalayan nation for decades.(Image credit: Niranjan Shrestha)

items.title: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah unseats Nepal's ex-PM as he heads for victory
items.standfirst: Thursday's general election was the first since violent youth-led protests toppled the government in September.
items.content: Thursday's general election was the first since violent youth-led protests toppled the government in September.

ai_summary: Balendra Shah wins election by a landslide margin
Rastriya Swatantra party secures thumping victory
Youth led protests toppled former government
Shah is a former rapper and popular figurehead
Election is first since gen Z protests

clusters.title: Improvised explosive found during protests near Mamdani's residence, NYPD says

items.title: Improvised explosive found during protests near Mamdani's residence, NYPD says
items.standfirst: New York City police said suspicious devices were ignited Saturday during clashing protests outside Gracie Mansion, the official residence of Mayor Zohran Mamdani on Manhattan's Upper East Side.
items.content: New York City police said suspicious devices were ignited Saturday during clashing protests outside Gracie Mansion, the official residence of Mayor Zohran Mamdani on Manhattan's Upper East Side.

items.title: Police investigating after device thrown at anti-Islam protest in New York City
items.standfirst: Incident started when someone from anti-Islam protest shot pepper spray into a counterprotesting group New York police have confirmed that an improvised explosive device was thrown outside Zohran Mamdani’s official residence on Saturday when anti-Islam demonstrators clashed with counterprotesters.New York police commissioner Jessica Tisch confirmed that a preliminary bomb squad analysis of the device that was ignited and thrown during the protest had “determined that it is not a hoax device or a smoke bomb”. Continue reading...
items.content: Incident started when someone from anti-Islam protest shot pepper spray into a counterprotesting group New York police have confirmed that an improvised explosive device was thrown outside Zohran Mamdani’s official residence on Saturday when anti-Islam demonstrators clashed with counterprotesters.New York police commissioner Jessica Tisch confirmed that a preliminary bomb squad analysis of the device that was ignited and thrown during the protest had “determined that it is not a hoax device or a smoke bomb”. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Device thrown at anti Islam protest in New York
NYPD confirms improvised explosive device found
Incident occurred outside Mayor Zohran Mamdani residence
Protesters clashed with counterprotesters on Saturday

clusters.title: What does the Pentagon's Anthropic ban mean? #tech

items.title: What does the Pentagon's Anthropic ban mean? #tech
items.standfirst: Formal supply‑chain block and its ripple effects The Department of Defense designation labels one major AI provider as a supply‑chain risk for defense systems. That designation instructs federal agencies and defense contractors to stop using the company’s models on classified or other defense…
items.content: Formal supply‑chain block and its ripple effects The Department of Defense designation labels one major AI provider as a supply‑chain risk for defense systems. That designation instructs federal agencies and defense contractors to stop using the company’s models on classified or other defense…

items.title: Anthropic at Risk of Huawei-Like Ban After Pentagon Punishment
items.standfirst: Anthropic PBC runs the risk of losing a wide range of US government business after the Defense Department declared it a supply-chain risk, a rare designation that until now has only been assigned to companies from adversary nations like China’s Huawei Technologies Co.
items.content: Anthropic PBC runs the risk of losing a wide range of US government business after the Defense Department declared it a supply-chain risk, a rare designation that until now has only been assigned to companies from adversary nations like China’s Huawei Technologies Co.

ai_summary: Anthropic labeled as supply chain risk
Federal agencies stop using company models
Defense contractors also affected by ban
Designation has ripple effects on tech industry
Anthropic at risk of losing US government business
